Our Electrical Service

Certified
Electrical Services

Our certified electricians provide a full range of electrical services for homes and businesses. From new installations to fault finding and repairs, every job is carried out safely and to the highest standard — and we provide the relevant certification on completion.

📋
✓ Electrical Installation Condition Report (EICR)
📋
✓ Minor Works Certificate
📋
✓ Electrical Installation Certificate (EIC)

What's Included

Electrical Services

Whether it's a new installation or an existing system, our certified engineers are ready to help.

01
New Installations
Full electrical installations for new builds and extensions — certified on completion.
→
02
Rewiring
Partial and full rewires for residential and commercial properties.
→
03
Fault Finding & Repair
Fast diagnosis and repair of electrical faults — available 24/7 for emergencies.
→
04
Consumer Unit Upgrade
Fuse board upgrades to modern consumer units, fully certified.
→
05
EICR Inspection
Electrical Installation Condition Reports — required for landlords and commercial premises.
→
06
Lighting & Sockets
Installation of lighting circuits, sockets, switches and outdoor electrics.
→
